name: elitea-skills
description: Claude-Code-native knowledge base for the ELITEA platform (next.elitea.ai). Includes 2 role-based agents (elitea-builder, elitea-integrator) and 4 progressive-disclosure skills (elitea-platform, elitea-pipeline, elitea-toolkit, elitea-testing). Use when authoring/deploying ELITEA agents and pipelines, wrapping APIs as ELITEA toolkits, or integrating external systems (GitHub Actions, Power Automate, Teams bots) with ELITEA via REST.
